summary: base58-utils: obfuscated payload with Buffer/base64 decoding in index.js
details: The package's index.js contains multiple Buffer.from(...) base64-style decode operations concentrated in a small file (lines 7, 29, 34, 49, 50), consistent with runtime string/payload de-obfuscation. The package presents as a small base58 utility but ships obfuscated content whose traced behavior could not be safely reproduced by automated content inspection. The combination of a minimal, benign-sounding utility name with heavy inline base64 decoding at module top-level is a common shape for credential/environment exfiltration or dropper payloads that execute on require/import.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
